description: This lesson focuses on improving basic cooking skills based on user feedback, emphasizing safety and confidence-building techniques.

steps.instruction: Review kitchen safety protocols before starting any cooking lesson.
Practice basic knife skills with a focus on safety and proper technique.
Learn to boil water safely and effectively, including tips on salting and draining.
Engage in a 'Got it' check after each step to reinforce learning and confidence.

safety_tips: Always use a cutting board when chopping ingredients.
Keep knives sharp to prevent accidents.
